meaning: 哈博罗内[博茨瓦纳首都]
examples: Gaborone is the capital and Francistown the largest city.
People stay in house, but not apartment in Gaborone. And I was given a chalet with 3 bedrooms to stay in as well!
In Botswana, Chinese workers brought in by construction companies now own hundreds of shops in the capital, Gaborone.
Gaborone has mushroomed into a well-run capital, and the university has 500 lecturers on its staff.
It's all a far cry from growing up in a dusty rural village on the outskirts of Gaborone, Botswana's capital.
